column6: Andros Island Queen Conch Strombus gigas
Shell Length and Lip Thickness: ENST 483 Data June 2019
8 Different Field Sites (n=40 shells per site) Examined by Students

2) Average conch size and SE per site (Std Error = SE = Std Dev / square root of number of samples)
